_comment: Edit this file to update site content. After editing, rebuild and re-upload to DirectAdmin.

events.title: 2025 Annual General Meeting at Mimosa Park
events.description: Members convened to review the year, elect new officials, and adopt our forward roadmap.

events.title: Island Camp Team Building Retreat
events.description: A weekend of reflection, recreation and renewed purpose for our growing welfare family.

events.title: County-wide Healthcare Worker Registration Drive
events.description: New members from across sub-counties joined the welfare under our open membership policy.

team.desc: Provides overall leadership and represents the welfare in all official engagements.
Supports the Chairperson and steps in when required to lead the welfare.
Keeps records, communicates with members, and coordinates official welfare correspondence.
Assists the Secretary and helps maintain accurate documentation of welfare activities.
Stewards welfare records and reports on activities to the membership.
Provides guidance, mentorship, and continuity to the welfare's mission and values.
